# Project Guidelines

## Workspace Boundaries

**This project has two zones with different permissions:**

### Zone: `Assets/sg01/` — Full Access
- You MAY read, create, and edit any file inside `Assets/sg01/`.
- All feature work, UI, scripts, and editors for this module live here.

### Zone: Everything else — Read Only
- You MAY read any file outside `Assets/sg01/` to understand the project (architecture, conventions, shared services, base classes, etc.).
- You MUST NOT create or modify any file outside `Assets/sg01/`.
- If a task seems to require editing a file outside `Assets/sg01/`, stop and ask the user before proceeding.
